stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stat.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones grounds out to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Cole Carrigg pinch-hit · Single
notableEvents.detail: Cole Carrigg singles on a line drive to center fielder Dane Myers. Jake McCarthy to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Trammell pinch-hit · Flyout
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Trammell flies out to shortstop Gunnar Henderson.

notableEvents.label: Josh Rojas pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Josh Rojas strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn pinch-hit · Pop Out
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn pops out to first baseman Kyle Stowers.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario grounds out, third baseman Max Muncy to first baseman Freddie Freeman.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit · Single
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill singles on a fly ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Blaze Alexander to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Ivan Johnson flies out to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit · Grounded Into DP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Vaughn Grissom to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Alan Roden out at 2nd. Ryan Kreidler out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette walks. Eric Wagaman to 3rd. Francisco Alvarez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Vilade pinch-hit · Home Run
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade homers (7) on a line drive to left field. Jonathan Aranda scores. Junior Caminero scores.
